run_summary.summary: One new inbound opportunity surfaced today: Wise Block (via Make Wonder INC) has been following up since April 23 on a paid collab for their Botanical Series building sets. They're offering cash + product and need a 1x YT/IG video — no rate proposed, they want our quote. The window is tight: their launch deadline is before April 25-30, so today and tomorrow are the last realistic days to respond. Creating a card so it's on the board. Liz also sent two outbound pitches yesterday (Shabebe + Black Diamond Coatings hardscape products for the backyard firepit project) — both already in the system from a prior run, no replies yet.

suggestions.message: Iris from Make Wonder INC (iris@makewondermcn.com) has been waiting since April 23 — this is their second touchpoint today. Their launch deadline is before April 30 so you're at the very end of the window. If you want this one, today is basically the last day to reply with your rate.

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate for 1x YT/IG Video
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Follow-up from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official partner agency for Wise Block, a premium building block brand under Alpha Group). Originally reached out Apr 23. Offer: cash fee + free Botanical Series set. Need: 1x YouTube/Instagram Video. Product: Botanical Series (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony) — Eastern-aesthetic building sets that double as home décor. Launch deadline: before April 25–30. Sample delivery: 3–5 days post-confirmation. No rate proposed — they want our quote. URGENT: launch window closing.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: New inbound — Make Wonder INC (Wise Block) following up on paid collab pitch. 1x YT/IG Video, cash fee, launch deadline before Apr 30.
